subject: chore(cold): trim defensive code, backfill TODO.md from cold-audit
body:
Findings from the cold reflective pass that are narrow cleanups
rather than fresh triggers.

Code
1. useDialogA11y: removed SSR guards in lockBodyScroll /
   unlockBodyScroll. The composable only runs inside Vue components
   mounted in the browser (lockBodyScroll is reachable only via
   onMounted); `typeof document === 'undefined'` can't fire. Kept
   the empty-focusable Tab guard (legitimate edge case) and the
   focus-yank-back branch (legitimate stacked-modal edge case where
   a click on an input in the outer modal moves focus out of the
   top dialog).
2. CashflowGraph: simplified `reducedMotion` from a reactive ref +
   matchMedia change listener + onMounted/onUnmounted wiring down
   to a single const read at init. Mid-session OS-level reduce-motion
   toggles are vanishingly rare; users can reload to pick up a
   preference change. Save 14 lines for coverage that costs more
   than it buys. Also removed `reducedMotion` from the chart :key
   (no longer reactive, never changes).

Docs (TODO.md backfill)
- `text-base-content/40` systematic audit — 30 residual uses after
  the a11y pass. Per-site visual review needed.
- Dashboard computed-chain debounce (deferred from motion trigger).
- CashflowGraph :key full re-init cost (deferred from motion trigger).
- Unit tests for useDialogA11y stack semantics.
- Unit tests for TransactionEditModal `isDirty`.
- ApexCharts English-only date format — deferred until i18n adoption.

Also added Performance, Testing, and Internationalization
categories so future work lands in the right bucket.

Type-check clean. 116/116 tests pass. Production build succeeds.

Tags: cleanup, cold-audit, todo, tests, perf, i18n
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-polish
Semver: patch
